Label DownloadsHUMAN+ · 40×12mm · NIIMBOT D110

Save: tap Save to Photos under any label → in the share sheet choose Save Image. (No button? Press & hold the label → Add to Photos.)
Print: NIIMBOT app → photo import → pick the label → it converts to black & white → print on 40×12mm.

Tip: the art fills a 10:3 frame, so choose “fit” (not “fill”) in NIIMBOT to avoid cropping. Double-check each conversion against your vial before printing a batch.
